title: sprk_playbookconsumer.sprk_matchconditions
description: Predicate JSON for compositional consumer→playbook routing. Stored in the sprk_matchconditions column of sprk_playbookconsumer. Match semantics: ALL keys must match. Value match: string => equality; array of strings => 'in list' (OR). Empty object {} or null/absent => always match (consumer-type + consumer-code + environment filters alone govern). Authoritative spec: chat-routing-redesign-r1 spec.md FR-1R-04.

oneOf.description: Equality match against the corresponding IRoutingContext field.
In-list match (OR) against the corresponding IRoutingContext field.

$comment: Match keys initially supported by ConsumerRoutingService (chat-routing-redesign-r1 task 028a / FR-1R-02): 'mimeType' (matches IRoutingContext.MimeType) and 'documentType' (matches IRoutingContext.DocumentType when classification is available — Phase 4). Unknown keys are IGNORED at match time (defensive: future-compatible). New match keys MUST be added to IRoutingContext + ConsumerRoutingService.TryMatchConditions in lockstep, then documented here.
